product_core.brand_language: <string: e.g., Dieter Rams Braun minimalism, aggressive gamer aesthetic>

surface_topology.continuity: <string: e.g., G3 continuous curves, hard chamfered edges>
surface_topology.parting_lines: <string: visibility and width of manufacturing seams>

secondary_material.refraction_and_caustics: <string|N/A: index of refraction, internal light scattering>

manufacturing_defects_and_realism: <string: micro-dust particles, subtle fingerprint smudges, injection molding sink marks>

branding_and_graphics.application_method: <string: e.g., pad printed, laser etched, debossed>

pedestal_and_surface.material: <string: e.g., frosted acrylic podium, rippled water, dark asphalt>

floating_elements_or_props: <string: e.g., water splashes, floating geometric primitives>

rim_lights: <string: e.g., twin strip boxes highlighting the silhouette>
studio_lighting_rig.bounce_and_negative_fill: <string: e.g., black flags to increase contrast on the sides>

depth_of_field.focus_stacking: <string: true/false, implies entire product is sharp>
